title: Yambio Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Yambio with a Z-Score of +5.20. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Yambio is causing extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Days (CDD) value of 17.2 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 28%, and the wind speed is 6.4 km/h, which is not providing any significant relief from the heat. 
 The absence of any Heating Degree Days (HDD) indicates that the temperatures are consistently high, with no significant drop in temperature.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave response protocols immediately.
